title: xanthophyllum andamanicum
intro: Xanthophyllum andamanicum is a species of flowering plant in the family Polygalaceae, commonly known as the Andaman yellowwood or Andaman polygala. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The extracts from Xanthophyllum andamanicum have been found to have potential health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and improving immune function, as well as exhibiting antioxidant and anticancer properties. In traditional medicine, the plant is often used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to treat various health conditions, including fever, diarrhea, and respiratory issues.
